name: fhenix-toolkit
description: Fhenix Protocol's official Claude Code plugin for CoFHE development.

metadata.description: Skills for building, testing, and auditing confidential smart contracts and dApps on Fhenix CoFHE — FHE.sol, @cofhe/sdk, mocks, and a 30+ gotcha catalog.

plugins.name: fhenix-toolkit
plugins.description: Write, test, and audit confidential Solidity and TypeScript on Fhenix CoFHE. Ships fhenix-contracts, fhenix-sdk (pending), fhenix-review, fhenix-tests skills plus the fhe-reviewer audit subagent.
